title: Anim hotbar selection
description: Upgrade your gameplay with this crisp, modern hotbar selection texture pack! Featuring smooth animations and a clean, polished design, it ensure your selected hotbar slot stands out with elegant flair.
body:
![123](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b41d3e7c9c63bd2aae17578a3a1c19d791226fa8_0.webp)
Hotbar Selection – Sleek and Stylish animated texurpack Hotbar Selection

Upgrade your gameplay with this crisp, modern hotbar selection texture pack! Featuring smooth animations and a clean, polished design, it ensures your selected hotbar slot stands out with elegant flair.
![123](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QGNnUsuH/images/2503f08aae1609bbcf5901359fb170b53a52f072.gif)
Whether you're battling mobs or building masterpieces, the sharp, intuitive visuals keep your focus right where it needs to be. Minimalist yet striking, this design blends seamlessly with any UI while adding a touch of sophisticated functionality.
Precision meets style – because even your hotbar deserves to look good! 🔥🎯
# To change the color, you need to unpack the texture pack and open the select color hotbar.bat file.And select the desired color by typing from 1-9 and press enter.
![123](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/980de150acd10baf8f2a62049f74d7ccf1488e3e.png)
![123](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/820062fac82a3e4e1af7c1538d7de3e4f062c19c.png)
